name: montezuma_near_death_priority_boost_v3
description: Increase replay priority for Montezuma near-death disagreements to force repeated learning on survival-critical transitions.
llm_notes: Montezuma disagree_near_terminal_rate is 0.8519 and mean_entropy is 2.4109, indicating persistent uncertainty exactly where deaths happen; stronger oversampling should improve survival alignment.

name: montezuma_high_entropy_phase_extend_12000
description: Extend Montezuma imitation phase to 12k steps to reduce broad policy uncertainty before RL dominates updates.
llm_notes: Montezuma mean_entropy=2.4109 is well above the 2.0 uncertainty threshold while alignment_rate is only 0.4094, so a longer imitation warm-up should stabilize human-strategy features.

name: asterix_high_conf_disagree_boost_v2
description: Increase priority for Asterix high-confidence disagreements so confidently wrong habits are corrected faster.
llm_notes: Asterix has alignment_rate=0.0292 with high_conf_disagree_rate=0.9708 and disagree_near_terminal_rate=0.8636, a clear confidently-wrong regime requiring targeted replay pressure.

name: centipede_high_conf_disagree_boost_v2
description: Apply aggressive replay boost on Centipede high-confidence disagreements to break entrenched wrong policy loops.
llm_notes: Centipede shows alignment_rate=0.0003 and high_conf_disagree_rate=0.9997 with mean_entropy=2.0995, so nearly all confident actions diverge from demonstrations and should be heavily reweighted.
